title: TFC Hourglass
body:
# Introduction
[TFC](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft) & [Better Days](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterdays) combine mod.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

I first made this mod for [Hourglass](https://modrinth.com/mod/hourglass) and got the name for it, and later replaced it with Better Days, but both of them and other mods that trigger TFC's time calibration mechanism can be fixed with this mod.

</details>


# Function
Now when the Better Days speed changing mechanism is in effect, the TFC's related mechanism will change the speed normally, instead of just changing the date.
